LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANNE BERGER'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS AND FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS. MOVING PARTY PRESENTED TO THE COURT A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY TOLD THE COURT THAT HE HAS WITHDRAWN THE LIS PENDENS. AFTER THE HEARING, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS AND FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF TO PROCEED WITH FILING OF AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTION IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998 ============================================================= AFTER HEARING THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: AS TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS, SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $515.00 IS AWARDED TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL. PLAINTIFF MUST REMIT THIS AMOUNT TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL BY JULY 30, 2011.

Valerie A. Kraml, Esq., of The Kraml Law, 510-717-3461 for defendant and moving party

DEFENDANT ANNE BERGER, AN INDIVIDUAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is off calendar, plaintiff to proceed with filing of an amended complaint. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Valerie A. Kraml, Esq., of The Kraml Law, 510-717-3461 for defendant and moving party
Chris Norris, Esq., Law Offices of Chris Norris for plaintiff and opposing party

Moving party presented to the court a valid proof of service.
Plaintiff's attorney told the court that he has withdrawn the Lis Pendens.
Argued and DEFENDANT ANNE BERGER'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Attorney's Fees And Costs is taken off calendar, plaintiff to proceed with filing of an amended complaint.
Defendant's request for sanction is taken under submission.
(302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
===========================================================================================

After hearing the court rules as follows:
As to defendant's request for sanctions.
Sanctions in the amount of $515.00 is awarded to defendant's counsel.
Plaintiff must remit this amount to defendant's counsel by July 30, 2011.
